summary: The ExEx manager divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in Poll::Ready returns and loop control expressions; no notification buffering, capacity, or send behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 114: M	crates/exex/exex/src/manager.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to `return Poll::Ready(Ok(()))`, `continue`, `break`, and `return Poll::Ready(Err(err.into()))` expressions.
No polling branch, notification ordering, error propagation target, buffer capacity update, or ExEx send side effect changed.
